name: review_post
description: Output a structured quality review of a blog post.

score.description: Quality score 1-10. 1-4 = reject (AI slop), 5-6 = borderline, 7-10 = publishable. The system derives pass/fail from this score (>= 6 passes).

issues.description: Specific issues found: clichés, filler sentences, generic advice, missing concrete examples, AI-isms, corporate tone, structural violations (missing table, missing callouts, word count out of range, more than one Mermaid diagram), code quality problems.

strengths.description: What the post does well — specific voice, concrete examples, genuine opinions, good structure, etc.
